meta.title: LLM Agent Fine-Tuning: Enhancing Task Automation with Weights & Biases
meta.description:
In our focused session on Fine-Tuning LLM Agents, you'll acquire crucial insights and techniques for enhancing the performance and specificity of local LLM Agents in application automation.

Throughout this webinar, we will explore a variety of essential topics, including:



Fine-Tuning Techniques: Learn about LORA (Low-Rank Adaptation) and its role in refining LLM behavior for specific applications.
Metrics and Logging: Understand the importance of tracking the right metrics and maintaining detailed logs using MLOps platforms like Weights & Biases.
Debugging with W&B: Discover how W&B Traces can be utilized for debugging and improving agent applications.
Prompting Paradigms: Delve into various prompting styles and their impact on the agent's behavior and task performance.
Practical Evaluation with W&B: Engage in hands-on evaluations using Weights & Biases to assess the improvements in your fine-tuned models, both quantitatively and qualitatively


By the end of this webinar, equipped with the insights and tools from Weights & Biases, you will have a foundational understanding of how to effectively fine-tune and evaluate LLM Agents. 



If you're inspired by this webinar, consider joining our comprehensive course with DeepLearning.AI, focusing on "Evaluating and Debugging Generative AI Models Using Weights & Biases". This course will further your journey into the realm of generative AI models and their practical applications, leveraging tools like Weights & Biases.


Speaker:

Anish Shah, MLOps Engineer at Weights and Biases



Anish is passionate about bringing ML ideas to life as practical products. Starting his career with various Data Science teams at SAP, he honed skills in traditional Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and recommendation systems. Now at Weights & Biases, Anish actively engages with practitioners, developing the ideal tools, lessons, and resources to democratize Machine Learning. His experience extends to demonstratively speaking both in-person and virtually at events like ODSC, Ray Summit, SnowFlake Developer Day, and more. With the art of programming and a little bit of magic, Anish crafts ML projects to help better serve others, turning "oh no's" into "a-ha's"!

NB: https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1Mv1tY0nUk5bS93vOuysBMv_7LgVEZcH0?usp=sharing
Slides: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1Dk7NuvC7ZgiKNhlaEnY9UG2PpcR2Y6XUd--meBguATs/edit?usp=sharing

GPT Finetuning deeper dive: https://wandb.ai/prompt-eng/openai-finetune-integration/reports/How-to-Fine-Tune-Your-OpenAI-GPT-3-5-and-GPT-4-Models-with-Weights-Biases--Vmlldzo2MDEwMjEw
OSS Finetuning deeper dive: https://wandb.ai/capecape/alpaca_ft/reports/How-to-Fine-Tune-an-LLM-Part-2-Instruction-Tuning-Llama-2--Vmlldzo1NjY0MjE1
Evaluation on RAG deeper dive: https://wandb.ai/wandbot/wandbot-eval/reports/How-to-Evaluate-an-LLM-Part-2-Manual-Evaluation-of-Wandbot-our-LLM-Powered-Docs-Assistant--Vmlldzo1NzU4NTM3
